title: Skincher
description:
This mod allows you to change your skin and cape directly in the game.

 You can upload your own cape.
 
 Good luck!
body:
🎯 Main Feature**

Instant skin change and selection of any Minecraft cloak. (And not only the official one, you can upload your own cloak)

 🔹 What's Included**
- 🪜 All official Minecraft cloaks
- ✅ Quick outfit customization

 🖼️ Interface**
Minimalist, pretty window with three main sections.
